import React from "react" class Evalulation extends React.Component { constructor(props) { super(props); this.state = { results: [] }; } componentDidMount() { let headers = new Headers(); headers.append('Content-Type', 'application/json'); headers.append('Accept', 'application/json'); //headers.append('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', 'http://localhost:3000'); //headers.append('Access-Control-Allow-Credentials', 'true'); fetch(`http://localhost:9000/amioncall`, { "method": "GET", headers: headers }) .then(response => response.json()) .then(response => { //console.log(response); this.setState({results: response}) //_forEach(response, d => console.log(d.name)) //console.log(this.state.results) }) .catch(err => { console.log(err); }); } render() { var todayDate = "" var teamHtml = "" var content = [] for (var x in this.state.results) { console.log(this.state.results[x]) todayDate = this.state.results[x].date teamHtml =
{this.state.results[x].team }: {this.state.results[x].name}
var residentsContent = [] for (var y in this.state.results[x].residents) { residentsContent.push(
- {this.state.results[x].residents[y].assignment}: {this.state.results[x].residents[y].name}
) } content.push(

) } return (

Date: {todayDate}

{content}
POST evals/initiate
https://medhub.com/functions/api/evals/initiate
Delivers a new evaluation.


Input Variables
Variable Name Data Type Required Version Notes
evaluationID integer Yes v1.15 Use evals/forms to get a list of all active evaluations for a given program or course.
evaluation_type integer Yes v1.15 Use evals/types to get a list of all available evaluation types.
evaluator_userID integer Yes v1.15 Identifies the user that will recieve the evaluation.
programID integer Yes v1.15 Identifies the program delivering the evaluation. *Required if courseID not provided.
courseID integer Yes v1.15 Identifies the course delivering the evaluation. *Required if programID not provided.
evaluatee_userID integer Yes v1.15 *Required for all evaluation types where the target is a person.
procedureID integer No v1.15 *Required for all evaluations of procedures.
lectureID integer No v1.15 *Required for all evaluations of conferences or sessions
globalserviceID integer No v1.15 *Required if evaluation is of a service AND clinicnameID is not provided. Use schedules/services to get a list of service groups for a given program.
clinicnameID integer No v1.15 *Required if evaluation is of a service AND globalserviceID is not provided. Use schedules/clinics to get a list of clinics defined for a given program or course.
notify boolean No v1.15 Pass TRUE to deliver an email notification to the evaluator.
Response Data Field Name Description Data Type Version Notes responseID unique identifier for evaluation response integer v1.15 Value "0" indicates a failed delivery.
); } }; export default Evalulation
